assertions.text: Each caption is clearly labeled with its target platform
Each caption uses platform-specific conventions, not the same text reformatted
No caption contains generic filler phrases such as 'check this out', 'so excited to share', or 'this one really hits different'
Opening line works as a standalone hook even in a truncated/preview view
Hashtags (where used) are topically relevant, not purely reach-padding with unrelated tags
Output is a numbered tweet list with each tweet clearly separated
Tweet 1 conveys the core claim and is understandable without reading the rest of the thread
The final tweet invites response via a question, provocative claim, or statement of consequence
No tweet begins with 'So...' or 'I mean...' or other verbal filler
